action.reasoning: Observation: current failure is a feature-dimension mismatch: planner now emits 20-dim features while the saved hybrid model was trained with 17-dim inputs. Analysis: this is purely a compatibility issue blocking evaluation of the current best planner; the safest fix is to make inference adapt checkpoint input dim and slice/pad features accordingly, while preserving the improved heuristic behavior. Decision: patch planner/model loading to infer in_dim from checkpoint weights, add a feature adapter, run a quick local eval on a small subset, and if successful immediately submit the unchanged hybrid checkpoint.
